  "findings": [
    "Grout voids detected under baseplate via sounding test",
    "Lack of vent holes in the baseplate preventing proper air escape during grouting"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Drill grout pour and vent holes where missing",
    "Inject epoxy grout to fill the identified voids",
    "Re-perform sounding test to verify 100% contact"
  ],
  "rationale": "API RP 686 requires baseplates of a certain size to have vent holes to prevent air entrapment. The sounding test confirmed voids under the plate, which compromises the structural support and vibration damping of the machinery.",
  "references": [
    "API RP 686 Chapter 5"
  ]
